body.title: CLOSED: file-lock training_corpus index writes
body.result: added fcntl LOCK_EX/LOCK_SH to _save_index/_load_index via companion .lock file
body.description:
Pass-2 area_7 finding: training_corpus._save_index() writes index.json without a file lock, creating a race when multiple COAs run concurrently. Move the fcntl-based lock into _save_index() so no caller needs to remember.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/training_corpus.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite
**Scope boundary:** IN — add fcntl lock inside _save_index() and _load_index(); both sides acquire. OUT — restructuring training corpus storage.
**Test plan:** test_training_corpus.py: two threads call _save_index() concurrently; assert no partial write (file is valid JSON after both complete).
**Pass condition:** Concurrent writes in test produce a valid, non-corrupted index.json.
